name: agent-channels
description: Slack-style channels for cross-session AI agent messaging

interface.shortDescription: Share local topic channels across agent sessions
interface.longDescription: Agent Channels gives Codex and Claude Code sessions a shared local file-backed channel system for status updates, coordination, review notes, and handoffs across worktrees or terminals.
defaultPrompt: Post a status update to an agent channel
Watch #help for messages from other agents
